In recent news, seven individuals were injured by carbon monoxide in a Bronx apartment, a day care was destroyed by fire, and severe storms caused power outages across New York and New Jersey, highlighting ongoing safety and infrastructure challenges in the region.

### Risks & Alerts

- 7 people injured, 2 seriously, by carbon monoxide in Concourse, Bronx apartment building. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Bronx day care destroyed in fire, leaving families scrambling for care. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Severe storms down trees and cause power outages across New York and New Jersey. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- MTA goes to court to secure $60M for the Second Ave. Subway from federal government. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxQY2k1QjNKQmVZa1dQeENmWU42emQ2Wm9LMmV1TVJ1NmRxbGJ0ZmVqUVNMclRZamUxNXVRLXdFRS1GTEJHMlA0TjVDSU04eEFtUG5zXzRRLTFPSjVkd1R3dFZrbHgzemhDVjhacTYxYjF0d3FIa2hRelBLRnF6UTVLZDNyeTNRMG1C?oc=5)
- ICE attempts to deport hundreds of African asylum seekers from New York to countries they are not from. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifEFVX3lxTE80YWdKQ0RGSUFVU21KV2x0b0RFRmFNNVBZWDlwZVdBd3BOOVJDeXJpdGZqN3RFbTdaRHJfdmNSLVdOelVMTk4yd0NMV0ZZakctTW9hUkRKWFJxand5czJTbDFCYWl1MWZiQXU0c1FDUFZpZUY1X2gzTFphOEo?oc=5)
- Judge orders NYC Council staffer detained by ICE to be deported. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYPD Commissioner Jessica Tisch addresses rising crime rates in the Bronx before City Council. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC developing a homeless shelter in Staten Island using a controversial zoning loophole. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Home care workers protest against 24-hour shifts at Mamdani’s office. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxNOFh5bkdEYm9DXzZ6WHRUdFBVZmItcGgyTEpfNzZkRXl3eGVxNUxCVnhJTnN0clh2Ni1VbmlzT1UzajNKSkd3UXhMZUhRMkpjZFhNNDhBU2Q2aW5tYXZ5NWtiYlJsSktPYU5DenQ2dXNMRnJLQWhNX0VuWkdJSElqZnJqVzVHb2p3ek9UOGZxQ2h4QQ?oc=5)

### Opportunities & Welfare

- NYC offers homeowners nearly $400K assistance to build basement and backyard apartments. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Housing Lottery launches for Bedford Beverly Phase 2 in Flatbush, Brooklyn. - Coney Island amusement park rides inspected ahead of opening day of 2026 season in Brooklyn. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
